<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Price List Management</title>
    <!-- External Font Stylesheet is now loaded dynamically via JS -->
    
    <!-- All styles consolidated into this single block -->
    <style>
        /* --- CSS Variables (Design Tokens) --- */
        :root {
            /* Colors */
            --c1: #FFFFFF;
            --c2: #F9F9F9;
            --c3: #F2F2F2;
            --c4: #ECECEC;
            --c5: #D0D0D0;
            --c6: #BCBCBC;
            --c7: #868686;
            --c8: #444444;
            --c9: #1C1C1C;
            --c10: #FF232B;
            --c12: #CB1B21;
            --c14: #3D893C;
            --c15: #7EA075;
            --orange: #AB4D2E;

            /* Additional Colors */
            --white: #FFFFFF;
            --card-bg: #f4f4f4;
            --card-border: #ececec;
            --hover-text: #a5a5a5;
            --hover-border: #a5a5a5;
            --menu-text: #374151;
            --menu-hover-bg: #F3F4F6;
            --menu-disabled-text: #9CA3AF;
            --badge-perf-bg: #66a945;
            --badge-default-bg: var(--c7);
            --badge-cost-bg: #9e5235;
            
            /* Fonts - Default fallback, will be updated by JS */
            --font-gotham: sans-serif;
            --font-tt-norms: "TT Norms Pro", sans-serif;

            /* Spacing */
            --space-1: 0.25rem;  /* 4px */
            --space-2: 0.5rem;   /* 8px */
            --space-4: 1rem;     /* 16px */
            --space-6: 1.5rem;   /* 24px */
            --space-8: 2rem;     /* 32px */
            --space-12: 3rem;    /* 48px */
            --grid-gap: 2vw;

            /* Borders & Shadows */
            --radius-sm: 4px;
            --radius-lg: 0.5rem;
            --radius-badge: 11px;
            --radius-full: 9999px;
            --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
            --shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);

            /* Typography */
            --text-xs: 11px;
            --text-sm: 13px;
            --text-base: 16px;
            --text-lg: 18px;
            --tracking-base: 0.2px;
        }

        /* --- Base & Reset Styles --- */
        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        body {
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            font-family: var(--font-gotham);
            font-size: var(--text-sm);
            color: var(--c8);
            background-color: var(--white);
            letter-spacing: var(--tracking-base);
        }

        img {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
        }

        button {
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 100%;
            background-color: transparent;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            color: inherit;
        }
        
        a {
            color: inherit;
            text-decoration: none;
        }

        /* --- Custom Styles --- */
        
        /* Specific font weights */
        .font-light { font-weight: 300; }
        .font-normal { font-weight: 400; }
        .font-bold { font-weight: 700; }
        .font-medium { font-weight: 500; }

        /* Custom scrollbar */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
            height: 6px;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #F9F9F9;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #D0D0D0;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: #BCBCBC;
        }
        .view-container { 
            min-height: 500px; 
        }
        
        /* Dropdown Menu */
        .dropdown-menu {
            display: none;
            position: absolute;
            right: 0;
            top: 100%;
            z-index: 50;
            width: 12rem;
            background-color: var(--white);
            border: 1px solid var(--c4);
            padding-top: var(--space-1);
            padding-bottom: var(--space-1);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
            border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
        }
        .dropdown-menu.open {
            display: block;
        }
        .dropdown-menu.upward {
            top: auto;
            bottom: 100%;
        }
        
        /* NEW: Sort Dropdown Specifics */
        .sort-dropdown {
            right: 0; /* Align right side */
            left: auto; 
            min-width: 10rem;
            margin-top: 4px;
        }
        
        /* Tooltips */
        #custom_tooltip, #lab_tooltip, #performance_tooltip, #limit_tooltip, #name_tooltip, #app_locked_tooltip, #delete_disabled_tooltip { 
            position: absolute;
            display: none; 
            background-color: #444; 
            color: white;
            padding: 5px 10px;
            font-size: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            z-index: 1000;
            pointer-events: none; 
            white-space: nowrap; 
            border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
        }
        #app_locked_tooltip {
            text-align: left;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
        }
        #name_tooltip {
            transform: translateX(-50%);
        }
        /* Tooltip Arrow */
        #custom_tooltip::after, #lab_tooltip::after, #performance_tooltip::after, #limit_tooltip::after, #name_tooltip::after, #app_locked_tooltip::after, #delete_disabled_tooltip::after {
            content: "";
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 100%;
            left: 50%;
            margin-left: -5px;
            border-width: 5px;
            border-style: solid;
            border-color: transparent transparent #444 transparent;
        }
        #lab_tooltip::after {
            left: var(--arrow-left, 50%);
        }
        .more-labs-label {
            cursor: default;
            color: #444444;
            position: absolute;
            top: 206px;
            left: 23px;
            font-size: var(--text-xs);
            font-weight: 400;
            letter-spacing: var(--tracking-base);
            line-height: 16.5px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            pointer-events: none; /* Prevent interfering with drag */
        }
        .is-editable .more-labs-label {
            /* Make it clickable when not dragging */
            pointer-events: auto;
        }
        .is-sorting .is-editable .more-labs-label {
            pointer-events: auto; /* Always allow tooltips */
        }

        .performance-badge-top-selling { 
            cursor: default;
        }

        /* --- Component Styles --- */

        .page-container {
            padding-bottom: var(--space-4);
        }
        
        main {
            /* This corresponds to view-container */
        }

        footer {
            margin-top: var(--space-8);
            text-align: center;
            font-size: var(--text-xs);
            color: var(--c8);
            letter-spacing: var(--tracking-base);
        }

        .icon-lg {
            width: 2.5rem; /* 40px */
            height: 2.5rem;
        }

        /* --- Header Layout --- */
        .page-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: baseline; /* Aligns the text content */
            margin-bottom: var(--space-8);
            gap: var(--space-4);
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        /* Introduction Section */
        .intro-section {
            text-align: left;
            max-width: 65%; /* Allow space for sort menu on right */
        }
        .intro-section p {
            line-height: 1.5;
        }
        .intro-section a {
            color: var(--c8);
            text-decoration: underline;
            transition: color 0.2s;
        }
        .intro-section a:hover {
            color: var(--hover-text);
        }
        .intro-section a:focus-visible {
            outline: 1px solid var(--c9);
            border-radius: 2px;
        }

        /* --- Controls Toolbar --- */
        .controls-toolbar {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            /* No margin bottom needed as header handles spacing */
        }

        .sort-container {
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: var(--space-2);
        }
        
        .sort-label {
            font-size: var(--text-sm);
            color: var(--c8); /* Now matching the intro text color */
        }

        /* Replaced select styles with custom trigger styles */
        .sort-trigger {
            font-family: var(--font-gotham);
            font-size: var(--text-sm);
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--c8);
            border: none;
            background-color: transparent;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 5px;
            padding: 0;
            transition: color 0.2s ease; /* Smooth color transition */
        }
        .sort-trigger:focus {
            outline: none;
        }
        
        /* Hover effect for the trigger (text) */
        .sort-trigger:hover {
            color: var(--c6);
        }
        
        /* Custom arrow */
        .sort-arrow {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            color: var(--c8);
            transition: color 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease; /* Smooth transitions */
        }

        /* Hover effect for the arrow */
        .sort-trigger:hover .sort-arrow {
            color: var(--c6);
            transform: translateY(2px); /* Move down 2px */
        }


        /* Price List Grid */
        .price-list-grid {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            justify-content: flex-start;
            gap: var(--grid-gap);
            margin-top: var(--space-6);
        }

        /* Base Card Style */
        .price-list-card {
            height: 255px;
            border: 1px solid var(--c4);
            transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
            flex-grow: 0;
            /* Responsive basis */
            flex-basis: calc((100% - var(--grid-gap)) / 2);
            max-width: 335px;
            position: relative;
        }
        
        /* Drop Target Visual */
        .price-list-card.drag-target {
            border: 1px dashed var(--c7); /* Dashed border for active drop zone */
            box-shadow: none;
        }


        /* "Add New" Card Variant */
        .add-new-card {
            background-color: var(--white);
            border-color: var(--c7);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .add-new-card:hover {
            border-color: var(--hover-border);
        }
        .add-new-card.is-disabled {
            opacity: 0.5;
            cursor: not-allowed;
        }
        .add-new-card.is-disabled:hover {
            border-color: var(--c7); /* Prevent hover effect */
        }
        
        .add-new-icon {
            color: var(--c8);
            transition: color 0.2s;
        }
        .add-new-text {
            margin-top: var(--space-2);
            font-size: var(--text-sm);
            font-weight: 400;
            letter-spacing: var(--tracking-base);
            color: var(--c8);
            transition: color 0.2s;
        }
        .add-new-card:hover .add-new-icon,
        .add-new-card:hover .add-new-text {
            color: var(--hover-text);
        }
        .add-new-card.is-disabled:hover .add-new-icon,
        .add-new-card.is-disabled:hover .add-new-text {
             color: var(--c8); /* Prevent hover effect */
        }

        /* Item Card Variant */
        .item-card {
            background-color: var(--card-bg);
            border-color: var(--card-border);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.2s ease-out, opacity 0.2s;
        }
        .item-card:hover {
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
        }
        .item-card.is-app-locked {
            background-color: var(--white);
        }

        /* Drag Handle Icon */
        .drag-handle-icon {
            position: absolute;
            top: 6px;  /* Moved 4px up from 10px */
            left: 6px; /* Moved 4px left from 10px */
            width: 18px;
            height: 18px;
            color: var(--c7); /* Base color for SVG */
            cursor: grab;
            opacity: 0; /* Hidden by default */
            transition: opacity 0.2s, color 0.2s;
            z-index: 10; /* Ensure it's above other content */
        }
        
        .drag-handle-icon svg {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
        }

        /* Show handle on hover ONLY on editable cards when custom order is active */
        .is-custom-order .item-card.is-editable:hover .drag-handle-icon {
            opacity: 1;
        }
        
        .drag-handle-icon:hover {
            color: var(--hover-text); /* Lighter on hover */
        }

        /* Drag & Drop States */
        .price-list-card.dragging {
            opacity: 0.4;
            transform: scale(1.03);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
            cursor: grabbing;
            pointer-events: none; /* NEW: Allows mouse events to pass through to target below */
        }


        /* Card Content */
        .price-list-name {
            position: absolute;
            top: 23px;
            left: 23px;
            right: 53px;
            font-family: var(--font-tt-norms);
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: var(--text-base);
            color: var(--c8);
            line-height: normal;
            letter-spacing: var(--tracking-base);
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            transition: left 0.2s;
        }
        
        .is-app-locked .price-list-name {
            color: var(--c7);
        }
        
        /* Card Menu */
        .menu-container {
            position: absolute;
            top: 15px;
            right: 0px;
        }
        .menu-toggle-btn {
            padding: var(--space-4);
            border-radius: var(--radius-full);
        }
        .menu-toggle-btn:focus-visible {
            outline: 2px solid var(--hover-border);
        }
        .menu-dots {
            display: flex;
            gap: 2px;
        }
        .menu-dot {
            width: 4px;
            height: 4px;
            background-color: var(--c8);
            border-radius: var(--radius-full);
            transition: background-color 0.2s;
        }
        .is-app-locked .menu-dot {
            background-color: var(--c7);
        }
        .menu-toggle-btn:hover .menu-dot {
            background-color: var(--hover-text);
        }

        /* Menu Items */
        .menu-item {
            display: block;
            padding: 0.5rem 1rem; /* py-2 px-4 */
            font-size: var(--text-sm);
            color: var(--menu-text);
            transition: background-color 0.2s;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        .menu-item:hover, .menu-item:focus-visible {
            background-color: var(--menu-hover-bg);
            outline: none;
        }
        .menu-item.is-disabled {
            color: var(--menu-disabled-text);
            cursor: not-allowed;
        }
        .menu-item.is-disabled:hover {
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        /* Card Badges */
        .badge-container {
            position: absolute;
            top: 54px;
            left: 23px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: row;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: var(--space-1);
            transition: left 0.2s;
        }

        .badge {
            color: var(--white);
            font-size: var(--text-xs);
            font-weight: 400;
            padding-left: 10px;
            padding-right: 10px;
            border-radius: var(--radius-badge);
            height: 21px;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        .badge-performance { background-color: var(--badge-perf-bg); }
        .badge-default { background-color: var(--badge-default-bg); }
        .badge-cost-update { background-color: var(--badge-cost-bg); }

        /* Card Stats */
        .stat-block {
            position: absolute;
        }
        .stat-revenue {
            top: 104px;
            left: 23px;
            transition: left 0.2s;
        }
        
        .stat-galleries {
            top: 104px;
            /* Dynamic 'left' is set via inline style */
        }
        .stat-products {
            top: 176px;
            /* Dynamic 'left' is set via inline style */
        }
        .stat-value {
            font-family: var(--font-tt-norms);
            font-size: var(--text-lg);
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--c8);
            letter-spacing: var(--tracking-base);
            line-height: 30px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            position: relative; /* For label positioning */
        }
        .stat-label {
            position: absolute;
            top: 30px;
            left: 0;
            font-size: var(--text-xs);
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--c8);
            letter-spacing: var(--tracking-base);
            line-height: 16.5px;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        .stat-revenue .stat-label {
            left: 2px;
        }
        .currency-symbol {
            cursor: default;
        }
        
        /* Card Labs */
        .no-labs-label {
            position: absolute;
            top: 178px;
            left: 26px;
            font-size: var(--text-xs);
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--c8);
            letter-spacing: var(--tracking-base);
            line-height: 16.5px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            transition: left 0.2s;
            pointer-events: none; /* Prevent interfering with drag */
        }
        .is-editable .no-labs-label {
            pointer-events: auto;
        }
        .is-sorting .is-editable .no-labs-label {
            pointer-events: auto;
        }

        .lab-logo-wrapper {
            position: absolute;
            top: 178px;
            left: 26px;
            width: 100px;
            height: 25px;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: left 0.2s;
            pointer-events: none; /* Prevent interfering with drag */
        }
        .is-editable .lab-logo-wrapper {
            /* Make it clickable when not dragging */
            pointer-events: auto;
        }
        .is-sorting .is-editable .lab-logo-wrapper {
            pointer-events: auto; /* Always allow tooltips */
        }
        
        .more-labs-label {
            top: 206px;
            left: 23px;
            transition: left 0.2s;
            pointer-events: none; /* Inherits from no-labs-label to ensure no conflict */
        }

        .lab-logo {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            object-position: left;
        }

        /* --- Responsive Media Queries --- */
        @media (min-width: 768px) { /* md */
            .page-container {
                padding-bottom: var(--space-6); /* md:pb-6 */
            }
            footer {
                margin-top: var(--space-12); /* md:mt-12 */
            }
            .price-list-card {
                /* 3 columns */
                flex-basis: calc((100% - 2 * var(--grid-gap)) / 3);
            }
        }

        @media (min-width: 1024px) { /* lg */
            .page-container {
                padding-bottom: var(--space-8); /* lg:pb-8 */
            }
            .price-list-card {
                /* 4 columns */
                flex-basis: calc((100% - 3 * var(--grid-gap)) / 4);
            }
        }

    </style>
</head>
<body> 
    <div class="page-container">
        <main id="viewHost" class="view-container">
            <!-- Content is rendered here by JS -->
        </main>
        <footer class=""> 
            <!-- 'mt-8 md:mt-12 text-center...' replaced by 'footer' tag style -->
        </footer>
    </div>

    <!-- Tooltip Elements -->
    <div id="lab_tooltip"></div> 
    <div id="performance_tooltip"></div> 
    <div id="custom_tooltip"></div>
    <div id="limit_tooltip"></div>
    <div id="name_tooltip"></div>
    <div id="app_locked_tooltip"></div>
    <div id="delete_disabled_tooltip"></div>

    <script>
        // --- 1. Global Public Methods (Input/Output) ---

        /**
         * Output Function: Handles all Calls to Action (CTAs) from the interface.
         * Logs the action and payload. Replaces alerts and console.logs.
         * @param {string} action_id - The identifier for the action.
         * @param {any} payload - The data associated with the action.
         */
        window.myop_cta_handler = function(action_id, payload) {
            // Log to console as requested (instead of alert)
            console.log(`[CTA Call] Action: "${action_id}"`, payload);
        };

        /**
         * Input Function: Initializes the interface with the full configuration object.
         * @param {object} config - The full data package.
         */
        window.myop_init_interface = function(config) {
            if (!config) {
                console.error("myop_init_interface: No config provided.");
                return;
            }

            // 0. Handle Fonts (Multiple)
            if (config.fonts && Array.isArray(config.fonts)) {
                const loadedUrls = new Set();
                config.fonts.forEach(fontDef => {
                    // Load Stylesheet if URL provided and not already loaded
                    if (fontDef.url && !loadedUrls.has(fontDef.url)) {
                        const link = document.createElement('link');
                        link.rel = 'stylesheet';
                        link.href = fontDef.url;
                        document.head.appendChild(link);
                        loadedUrls.add(fontDef.url);
                    }
                    // Set CSS Variable
                    if (fontDef.variable && fontDef.family) {
                        document.documentElement.style.setProperty(fontDef.variable, fontDef.family);
                    }
                });
            } else if (config.font) {
                // Fallback for legacy single font object
                if (config.font.url) {
                    const link = document.createElement('link');
                    link.rel = 'stylesheet';
                    link.href = config.font.url;
                    document.head.appendChild(link);
                }
                if (config.font.family) {
                    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--font-gotham', config.font.family);
                }
            }

            // 1. Handle Language
            if (config.lang) {
                Object.assign(lang, config.lang);
            }

            // 2. Handle Limits
            if (typeof config.priceListLimit === 'number' && config.priceListLimit >= 0) {
                priceListLimit = config.priceListLimit;
            }

            // 3. Handle Data (Price Lists)
            let dataToSet = config.priceLists ? config.priceLists : [];
            if (!Array.isArray(dataToSet)) {
                console.error("myop_init_interface: Invalid 'priceLists' format.");
                dataToSet = [];
            }

            // Pre-calculate sales and performance metrics
            if (dataToSet.length > 0) {
                const dataWithSales = dataToSet.map(p => ({
                    ...p,
                    last365DaysSales: calculateLast365DaysSales(p.groupedOrderSales)
                }));
                const maxRevenue = Math.max(...dataWithSales.map(p => p.last365DaysSales));
                
                priceListsData = dataWithSales.map(p => {
                    const { last365DaysSales, ...rest } = p; 
                    if (last365DaysSales === maxRevenue && maxRevenue > 0) {
                        return {...rest, last365DaysSales, performance: 'best'};
                    }
                    return {...rest, last365DaysSales, performance: 'mid'};
                });
            } else {
                priceListsData = [];
            }

            // 4. Handle View Preferences (Sorting & Order) from DTO
            if (config.shopsViewPref) {
                // Set Sorting Mode
                if (config.shopsViewPref.sortingMode) {
                    currentSort = config.shopsViewPref.sortingMode;
                }
                
                // Set Custom Order (pricingIds)
                if (Array.isArray(config.shopsViewPref.pricingIds)) {
                    priceListsOrder = config.shopsViewPref.pricingIds;
                } else {
                    // Fallback if no IDs provided
                    priceListsOrder = priceListsData.map(p => p.id);
                }
            } else {
                // Default fallback if pref object is missing
                currentSort = 'auto'; // Default to 'Last used' (auto)
                priceListsOrder = priceListsData.map(p => p.id);
            }

            console.log("Interface initialized with config.");
            loadView();
        };

        // --- Internal State ---
        let lang = {};
        const tr = (key) => lang[key] || key;
        let priceListsData = []; // The original, unsorted data
        let priceListsOrder = []; // Array of IDs for custom order
        let priceListLimit = 100;
        
        // Sorting state (aligned with DTO values: "auto", "custom", "AtoZ", "ZtoA", "galleries", "products")
        let currentSort = 'auto'; 
        let currentSearch = '';

        // --- Drag & Drop State ---
        let draggedItem = null;
        let dragOverItem = null;
        let isAnimating = false; 
        
        // --- SVG Icons --- 
        const ICONS = {

        // FLIP Animation helper
        function performAnimatedMove(container, moveLogic) {
            if (isAnimating) return; 
            isAnimating = true;

            const children = Array.from(container.children);
            const snapshots = children.map(child => {
                const rect = child.getBoundingClientRect();
                return { child, left: rect.left, top: rect.top };
            });

            moveLogic();

            snapshots.forEach(({ child, left, top }) => {
                if (child.classList.contains('dragging')) return;
                const newRect = child.getBoundingClientRect();
                const dx = left - newRect.left;
                const dy = top - newRect.top;

                if (dx !== 0 || dy !== 0) {
                    child.style.transition = 'none';
                    child.style.transform = `translate(${dx}px, ${dy}px)`;
                    void child.offsetWidth;
                    child.style.transition = 'transform 0.2s ease-in-out';
                    child.style.transform = '';
                }
            });

            setTimeout(() => {
                isAnimating = false;
            }, 200);
        }

        function calculateLast365DaysSales(salesData) {
            if (!salesData || salesData.length === 0) {
                return 0;
            }
            const today = new Date();
            const oneYearAgo = new Date();
            oneYearAgo.setDate(today.getDate() - 365);
            return salesData.reduce((total, sale) => {
                const orderDate = new Date(sale.orderDate);
                if (orderDate >= oneYearAgo && orderDate <= today) {
                    return total + sale.sales;
                }
                return total;
            }, 0);
        }
        
        function formatCurrency(amount, currencySymbol, options = {}) {
            const { showCents = true } = options;
            try {
                const numberValue = new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US', {
                    style: 'decimal',
                    minimumFractionDigits: showCents ? 2 : 0,
                    maximumFractionDigits: showCents ? 2 : 0
                }).format(amount);
                return {symbol: currencySymbol, value: numberValue.trim()}; 
            } catch (e) {
                return {symbol: currencySymbol, value: showCents ? amount.toFixed(2) : Math.round(amount)};
            }
        }

            const escapedLabName = labName.replace(/'/g, "\\'").replace(/"/g, """); 
            
            let onErrorFallbackHTML;
            if (labName === 'Self Fulfill') {

                const displayName = escapedLabName || tr('logoError');
                onErrorFallbackHTML = `<span style='font-size:10px; color: var(--c8);'>${displayName}</span>`;
            }
            const onErrorJs = `this.style.display='none'; this.parentElement.innerHTML = '${onErrorFallbackHTML.replace(/'/g, "\\'")}';`;
            
            let html = `

        // --- Tooltip Functions ---
        function showLabTooltip(event) {
            clearTimeout(labTooltipTimeout);
            const targetElement = event.target;
            const tooltipContent = targetElement.dataset.tooltipContent;
            labTooltipTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                if (!labTooltipElement || !tooltipContent) return;
                const labNames = tooltipContent.split(', ');
                let processedContent = tooltipContent; 
                if (labNames.length > 10) {
                    processedContent = labNames.slice(0, 10).join(', ') + '...';
                }
                labTooltipElement.textContent = processedContent;
                const rect = targetElement.getBoundingClientRect();
                let leftPos = rect.left + window.scrollX;
                labTooltipElement.style.left = leftPos + 'px';
                labTooltipElement.style.top = rect.bottom + window.scrollY + 10 + 'px';
                labTooltipElement.style.display = 'block';
                const tooltipRect = labTooltipElement.getBoundingClientRect();
                if (tooltipRect.left < 0) {
                    labTooltipElement.style.left = '10px';
                } else if (tooltipRect.right > window.innerWidth) {
                    const newLeft = window.innerWidth - tooltipRect.width - 10;
                    labTooltipElement.style.left = newLeft + 'px';
                }
                const finalTooltipLeft = labTooltipElement.getBoundingClientRect().left;
                const triggerCenter = rect.left + rect.width / 2;
                const arrowLeftOffset = triggerCenter - finalTooltipLeft;
                labTooltipElement.style.setProperty('--arrow-left', `${arrowLeftOffset}px`);
            }, 300); 
        }
        function hideLabTooltip() {
            clearTimeout(labTooltipTimeout);
            if (labTooltipElement) {
                labTooltipElement.style.display = 'none';
                labTooltipElement.style.removeProperty('--arrow-left');
            }
        }

                label.removeEventListener('mouseenter', showLabTooltip);

        // --- Event Listeners ---
        function attachMenuListeners(container) {
            container.querySelectorAll('.menu-toggle-btn').forEach(button => {
                button.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
                    event.stopPropagation(); 
                    const menuId = `menu-${button.dataset.menuid}`;
                    const menu = document.getElementById(menuId);
                    if (!menu) return;
                    document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.open').forEach(openMenu => {
                        if (openMenu.id !== menuId) {
                            openMenu.classList.remove('open');
                            openMenu.classList.remove('upward');
                        }
                    });
                    const isOpening = !menu.classList.contains('open');
                    menu.classList.toggle('open');
                    if (isOpening) {
                        const menuHeight = menu.offsetHeight;
                        const buttonRect = button.getBoundingClientRect();
                        const spaceBelow = window.innerHeight - buttonRect.bottom;
                        if (spaceBelow < menuHeight && buttonRect.top > spaceBelow) {
                            menu.classList.add('upward');
                        } else {
                            menu.classList.remove('upward');
                        }
                    } else {
                        menu.classList.remove('upward');
                    }
                });
            });
        }

            const sortTrigger = document.getElementById('sort-trigger');

                sortTrigger.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.open').forEach(m => {
                        if (m !== sortDropdown) m.classList.remove('open');
                    });
                    sortDropdown.classList.toggle('open');
                });

                // Sort Options Click
                sortDropdown.querySelectorAll('.menu-item').forEach(item => {
                    item.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        const newSort = item.dataset.value;
                        
                        // 1. Update Local State for instant feedback
                        currentSort = newSort;
                        sortDropdown.classList.remove('open');
                        loadView();
                        
                        // 2. Call Output Function (CTA)
                        window.myop_cta_handler('changeSortType', newSort);
                    });
                });
            }
        }

        // Listeners for Drag and Drop
        function attachDragListeners(grid) {
            grid.addEventListener('dragstart', (e) => {
                if (e.target.matches('.item-card[draggable="true"]')) {
                    draggedItem = e.target;
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        if (draggedItem) draggedItem.classList.add('dragging');
                    }, 0);
                    if (draggedItem) draggedItem.classList.add('dragging-internal');
                } else {
                    e.preventDefault();
                }
            });

            grid.addEventListener('dragend', (e) => {
                if (!draggedItem) return;
                draggedItem.classList.remove('dragging');
                document.querySelectorAll('.price-list-card').forEach(card => card.classList.remove('drag-target'));

                setTimeout(() => {
                    if (draggedItem) draggedItem.classList.remove('dragging-internal');
                    draggedItem = null;
                }, 100);
                
                dragOverItem = null;

                // Get new order
                const newOrder = [...grid.querySelectorAll('.item-card[draggable="true"]')].map(item => item.dataset.id);
                priceListsOrder = newOrder;
                
                // Call Output Function (CTA)
                window.myop_cta_handler('pricelistsSortOrder', priceListsOrder);
            });

            grid.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault(); 
                if (!draggedItem || isAnimating) return;

                e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move';
                
                const target = e.target.closest('.item-card[draggable="true"]');
                
                if (!target || target === draggedItem) {
                    return;
                }

                if (target === dragOverItem) return;

                if (dragOverItem) {
                    dragOverItem.classList.remove('drag-target');
                }
                dragOverItem = target;
                target.classList.add('drag-target');
                
                const parent = target.parentElement;
                const draggedIndex = [...parent.children].indexOf(draggedItem);
                const targetIndex = [...parent.children].indexOf(target);

                const moveFn = () => {
                     if (draggedIndex < targetIndex) {
                         parent.insertBefore(draggedItem, target.nextElementSibling);
                     } else {
                         parent.insertBefore(draggedItem, target);
                     }
                };
                
                performAnimatedMove(parent, moveFn);
            });

            grid.addEventListener('dragleave', (e) => {
                 const relatedTarget = e.relatedTarget;
                 const target = e.target.closest('.item-card');
                 if (target && (!relatedTarget || !target.contains(relatedTarget))) {
                     target.classList.remove('drag-target');
                     if (target === dragOverItem) dragOverItem = null;
                 }
            });

            grid.addEventListener('drop', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                document.querySelectorAll('.price-list-card').forEach(card => card.classList.remove('drag-target'));
            });
        }

        // Global click listener to close menus
        function handleGlobalClick(event) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.open').forEach(openMenu => {
                if (!openMenu.parentElement.contains(event.target)) {
                    openMenu.classList.remove('open');
                    openMenu.classList.remove('upward');
                }
            });
            if (labTooltipElement && labTooltipElement.style.display === 'block') {
                 if (!event.target.classList.contains('more-labs-label')) hideLabTooltip();
            }
            if (performanceTooltipElement && performanceTooltipElement.style.display === 'block') {
                 if (!event.target.classList.contains('performance-badge-top-selling')) hidePerformanceTooltip();
            }
            if (limitTooltipElement && limitTooltipElement.style.display === 'block') {
                const disabledTile = document.getElementById('new-price-list-tile-disabled');
                if (!disabledTile || !disabledTile.contains(event.target)) hideLimitTooltip();
            }
            
            const clickedCard = event.target.closest('.item-card.is-editable');
            if (clickedCard) {
                if (clickedCard.classList.contains('dragging-internal')) {
                    event.preventDefault();
                    event.stopPropagation();
                } else if (clickedCard.hasAttribute('draggable') && clickedCard.getAttribute('draggable') === 'true') {
                    window.myop_cta_handler('edit', clickedCard.dataset.id);
                }
            }
        }
        
        document.addEventListener('click', handleGlobalClick);

        document.addEventListener('keydown', function(event) {
            if (event.key === 'Escape') {
                document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu.open').forEach(openMenu => {
                    openMenu.classList.remove('open');
                    openMenu.classList.remove('upward');
                });
            }
        });
        
        // --- Main View Renderer ---
        function loadView() {
            const viewHost = document.getElementById('viewHost');
            if (!viewHost) return;
            let dataToShow = [...priceListsData];

            let editableItems = dataToShow.filter(p => p.type !== 'appLocked');
            let disabledItems = dataToShow.filter(p => p.type === 'appLocked');

            const sortFn = (a, b) => {
                switch (currentSort) {
                    case 'auto': // 'Last used'
                         return getLastUsedTimestamp(b) - getLastUsedTimestamp(a);
                    case 'dateCreated':
                         return getCreatedTimestamp(b) - getCreatedTimestamp(a);
                    case 'AtoZ':
                        return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
                    case 'ZtoA':
                        return b.name.localeCompare(a.name);
                    case 'galleries':
                         return b.galleriesUsing - a.galleriesUsing;
                    case 'products':
                         return b.products - a.products;
                    case 'custom':
                        const indexA = priceListsOrder.indexOf(a.id);
                        const indexB = priceListsOrder.indexOf(b.id);
                        if (indexA === -1) return 1;
                        if (indexB === -1) return -1;
                        return indexA - indexB;
                    default:
                        return 0;
                }
            };

            editableItems.sort(sortFn);
            disabledItems.sort(sortFn);

            dataToShow = [...editableItems, ...disabledItems];
            views['New Design Layout'](dataToShow, viewHost);
        }
